topic: The Sanad AI Assistant: ask it how much a work permit costs, where the nearest licensed Sanad office is, or how to set up a company in Oman. It answers like a PRO officer who has done it hundreds of times.
format: Walk through the exact day-in-the-life of a Sanad office manager handling 20+ client companies with no case tracking system — every painful step in sequence
post:
Every Sanad office worker knows the 8:15am gut drop: three clients, three urgent questions, zero seconds to find the answer.

One wants to know if their new hire's work permit is ready. One is asking what a family residence visa costs. The third needs to know which documents to bring for a company registration.

You're answering all three from memory — or digging through three different WhatsApp threads for a screenshot of a fee schedule you saved two months ago.

This is Sanad office work in 2025. Not because the job is hard. Because nobody built the right tool for it.

That's why we built the Sanad AI Assistant.

Ask it the cost of a work permit. Ask it where the nearest licensed Sanad office is. Ask it how to register a company in Oman. It answers the way a PRO officer with ten years in answers — specific, current, bilingual.

No login. No waiting. Free.

Verified government fees. Licensed offices by governorate. Full service quotes on the spot.

If you're running a Sanad office and still fielding basic fee questions on WhatsApp, your time is worth more than that.

Try the Sanad AI Assistant free — instant answers on work permits, visas & government fees: https://www.thesmartpro.io/sanad/assistant?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=sanad-pro
